title: procris pilifera
intro: Procris pilifera, also known as the "Fire Bush" or "Firecracker Bush", is a flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Procris pilifera include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Procris pilifera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to reduce fever and alleviate pain.
